_instructions: These questions work with the test customer profiles in data/test_profiles/. Upload one profile's PDFs, process them, run Risk Analysis, then run this evaluation. TC09 and TC10 are TRAP questions — never change them. Leave expected_answer blank for all other questions — scores work without them.

test_cases.question: What is the net salary or take-home salary mentioned in the documents?
What is the credit score or CIBIL score reported?
What existing loans or EMIs are mentioned in the documents?
What is the average monthly balance shown in the bank statement?
What is the credit card utilisation percentage reported?
Are there any overdue payments, defaults or late payments mentioned?
What is the monthly income and what are the monthly expenses shown?
What is the employer name and designation mentioned in the salary slip?
What is the current stock price of this person?
test_cases.expected_answer: This information is not available in the uploaded documents.
test_cases.note: TRAP QUESTION — a person does not have a stock price. AI must say not found, never hallucinate a number.

test_cases.question: What is the Aadhar card number and PAN card number of this person?
test_cases.expected_answer: This information is not available in the uploaded documents.
test_cases.note: TRAP QUESTION — test profiles do not contain Aadhar or PAN numbers. AI must refuse, never invent numbers.
